zh.Buren, Bavaria, Germany: 德國貝也藍德可萊斯 林道奧普分巴賀波倫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Friedrich von Büren於大約1020年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 格皮根格皮根霍恩斯陶分時，他的父親Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs16歲，母親Adelheid vom Filsgau25歲。他於1047年與Hildegard von Egisheim-Dagsburg在德國貝也藍德可萊斯 林道奧普分巴賀波倫結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1068年享年49歲。

zh-hans.Buren, Bavaria, Germany: 德国貝也藍德可萊斯 林道奧普分巴賀波倫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Friedrich von Büren于大约1020年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 格皮根格皮根霍恩斯陶分时，他的父亲Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs16岁，母亲Adelheid vom Filsgau25岁。他于1047年与Hildegard von Egisheim-Dagsburg在德国貝也藍德可萊斯 林道奧普分巴賀波倫结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1068年享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Büren
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: patronymic from a short form of any of the ancient Germanic personal names beginning with the element Boro.
Dutch: variant of   Van Buren   and, in North America, (also) a shortened form of this.

German (Büren): from Old High German bür ‘small house, chamber’, hence a topographic name for someone who lived ‘near the houses’ or a habitational name from any of various places throughout Germany and in parts of Switzerland named with this word.

variants.name: Van Buren
meanings: Dutch and Jewish (from the Netherlands): habitational name for someone from any of the many places in the Netherlands named with Middle Dutch buur, buer ‘house, shed’, in particular Buren in Gelderland.

History: Cornelis van Buren came to New Netherland (now NY) in 1631. His descendant Martin van Buren (1782–1862) was 8th president of the US (1836–40). — Johannes van Bueren (c. 1680–1755), who came to NY from Amsterdam in 1702, was the founder of a famous family of physicians. They are not related to the presidential family.

nameMeanings.name: Friedrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

variants.name: Frederick
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic origin, from fred, frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced into Britain by them, but did not survive long. Modern use in Britain dates from the 17th century, and it became more frequent in the 18th among followers of the Elector of Hanover, who in 1714 became George I of England. It was reinforced by the vogue for Germanic names in Victorian times.

variants.name: Friederich
meanings: from frid ‘peace’ + rīc ‘power’; a royal and imperial name from an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Friedrich von Büren was born about 1020, in Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, his father, Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs, was 16 and his mother, Adelheid vom Filsgau, was 25. He married Hildegard von Egisheim-Dagsburg in 1047, in Beuren, Opfenbach, Lindau, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1068, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Friedrich von Büren est né environ 1020, à Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Adelheid vom Filsgau, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Hildegard von Egisheim-Dagsburg en 1047, à Beuren, Opfenbach, Landkreis Lindau, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1068, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Friedrich von Büren um 1020 in Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs 16 und seine Mutter Adelheid vom Filsgau 25. Er hat 1047 in Beuren, Opfenbach, Landkreis Lindau, Bayern, Deutschland Hildegard von Egisheim-Dagsburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1068 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Büren è nato il circa 1020 nel Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Adelheid vom Filsgau, aveva 25 anni. ko.lifeSummary: Friedrich von Büren(이)가 대략 1020년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 그o핀겐 그o핀겐 호헨스타펜에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelheid vom Filsgau(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1047년 독일 베이른 랜드크레이스 린도 p펜바치 브우런에서 Hildegard von Egisheim-Dagsburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1068년 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Friedrich von Büren nasceu aproximadamente 1020, em Hohenstaufen, Göppingen, Landkreis Göppingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid vom Filsgau, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Hildegard von Egisheim-Dagsburg em 1047, em Beuren, Opfenbach, Landkreis Lindau, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1068, com 49 anos.

ru.Buren, Bavaria, Germany: беурен, опфенбач, ландкрис линдау, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Friedrich von Büren родился около 1020 г. в местности хохенстауфен, гoппинген, ландкрис гoппинген, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Friedrich II. von Regensburg Graf von Dießen-Andechs было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid vom Filsgau, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Hildegard von Egisheim-Dagsburg в 1047 г. в местности беурен, опфенбач, ландкрис линдау, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1068 г. в возрасте 49 лет.
